'''''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 158''' is the one hundred fifty-eighth issue of the ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly]]'' series of comic reprints, published in [[June]] [[1982]].

Starting with the next issue, the series would be renamed ''[[Star Wars Monthly]]'', but would continue the numbering used under the previous title.

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]]
